name: What damages can I get for work chem exposure in Saint George?

mainEntity.name: What damages can I get for work chem exposure in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Medical bills, lost wages (2/3 avg), temporary/permanent disability, rehab, and death benefits.** Utah caps non-economic but covers economic fully.[6] Key factors: impairment rating via AMA guides, settlement multipliers. No pain/suffering in comp; third-party uncapped. Maximize via negotiation.
